mlp_only.description: MLP [66->16->1] with random weights, no heuristic

mlp_plus_capture_heuristic.description: MLP + capture value bonus (0.5x piece value) — deprecated

mlp_plus_positional_eval.description: MLP + positional evaluation (captures 2x, center, development, check bonus, king safety) + T=0.5 softmax

mlp_reinforce_trained.description: MLP + positional eval + post-game REINFORCE weight updates (after 10+ games)

improvement_sources.impact: Significant — agent evaluates captures, center control, development, and checks
Moderate — T=0.5 makes agent prefer higher-scored moves more aggressively
Cumulative — agent improves MLP weights after each game using REINFORCE gradients
